caption: A person's hands are shown crafting a card on a white gridded cutting mat. The person wears a white smartwatch on their left wrist and a ring on their left ring finger. In the initial scene, they hold a brown card piece featuring a white label that reads, "Wishing you a BIRTHDAY filled with all the best things," while holding a crafting tool in their right hand. As the sequence progresses, the person positions a piece of floral-patterned paper over the brown card, aligning the edges. They use their fingers to press down and secure the patterned paper onto the base, partially covering the label while leaving a portion of the "BIRTHDAY" text visible. A "Stamping Jill" logo with a heart icon is visible in the bottom left corner of the workspace. Throughout the process, various scraps of patterned paper remain scattered on the cutting mat.
